daily.today_energy: your creative fire is peak right now—lean into those ideas that feel a little unconventional. the universe is giving you permission to be unapologetically yourself today, and honestly? it's your moment to shine.
daily.love: someone's noticing the glow-up. whether you're coupled up or flying solo, your energy is magnetic rn. if you've been thinking about a conversation, the vibe is right—authenticity is your best love language today.
daily.career: your ideas have weight today. don't dim yourself in meetings or conversations—your perspective matters more than you realize. this is good energy for pitching something you've been sitting on or asking for what you deserve.
daily.health: your body's telling you it needs movement that feels good, not punishing. dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive rather than obligated. tune into what actually energizes you instead of what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: Your energy is magnetic this week, Leo. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to lean into your authentic self without apology. Trust the momentum building around you—something real is shifting beneath the surface.
weekly.love: Venus is playing in your favor, but the real magic happens when you're vulnerable first. Whether single or coupled, let people see the parts of you that usually stay hidden. That's where genuine connection lives.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to speak up in that meeting or pitch what you've been sitting on. The universe is backing your confidence, so channel it into something tangible and watch doors open.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence this week. Whether it's moving intentionally, resting deeply, or checking in with how you actually feel—honor those signals. Energy shifts when you listen to yourself first.
